AzureAd.TenantId: <Your TenantId of the AzureAd Server App Registration>
AzureAd.ClientId: <Your ClientId of the AzureAd API App Registration>
AzureAd.ClientSecret: <Your ClientSecret of the AzureAd Server App Registration>

Entra.//Enabled: Set to true to enable Entra ID login. Local-only deployments leave this false.
Entra.//SpaClientId: Required when Enabled=true. Client ID of the SPA (frontend/client) app registration — used by the browser OIDC client to initiate sign-in.
Entra.//ApiScope: Required when Enabled=true. The API scope to request so Entra issues an access token for the API, e.g. api://{api-client-id}/access_as_user.
Entra.//Audience: Required when Enabled=true. Client ID of the API app registration — must match the token's 'aud' claim. For v2.0 tokens this is the bare GUID (not api://...).
Entra.//AllowedTenantIds: Required when Enabled=true. Array of Entra tenant IDs permitted to authenticate.
